title: OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER - 211info
text: STAYTON COMMUNITY CENTER OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers overnight shelter when temperatures reach 32 degrees or below. 400 W Virginia Street Stayton, OR 97383 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older Hours: Open January 19-January 23, 2026 Monday/Wednesday/Friday 6pm-8am, Tuesday/Thursday 8pm-8am (503) 769-2919 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 769-2919 Main phone INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Marion County Services: Community Shelters Extreme Weather Shelters Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - TRANSPORTATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. STAYTON COMMUNITY CENTER
